title: Call Center Integration # Yeastar

posts.author: Thanasis (Thanasis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, we use Yeastar call center and monday.com as crm.
I want to connect our call center with monday.com to be able to monitor my team’s performance, average call duration etc.
Monday.com has aircall but it doesnt look that good.
Is there anything simple anyone can propose? Thank you in advance

posts.author: benhowes (Ben Howes 🐨)
posts.cookedHtml:
Capable Koala is working on an integration app for Yeastar, you can register for access here

It will offer:

  1. Automatic number prefixing
  2. Call data board (CDR), which will allow the performance monitoring dashboards you ask for
  3. Caller ID lookup

posts.author: Jemzwed (Jemzwed)
posts.cookedHtml: I tried something similar by using webhooks with some custom automation and it worked fine for pushing call data into items. The tricky part was syncing real-time call status cleanly.

posts.author: Martin2223 (Martin)
posts.cookedHtml: We used Aircall back in the day but we ran into issues with the cost of extra numbers and limited storage on the lower tier plan that we’ve been using at that time so it got a bit pricey. Then we compared Justcall and Cloudtalk. Justcall was pretty good, but I think Cloudtalk came out ahead, mainly because of its UX and cost efficiency for smaller teams like we were at that time.

posts.author: Jemzwed (Jemzwed)
posts.cookedHtml: I had the same problem, and what worked for us was setting up webhooks in monday.com to sync with Yeastar’s API. We used that to log call data into a board and then linked it to our cloud call center so we could track call status and agent performance directly. Took some trial and error, but it’s running smooth now. Let me know if you want the exact webhook setup we used.
